CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-21-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
3:50 P.M. Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Craig Kroner, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Jesus Granados, also present in court.
Paul Silver, Esq. for Defendants: Suheil Salfiti, Victoria Salfiti, and Save More Market, not present in court. Sandra Watts from State Farm Insurance present with Mr. Silver.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record without the Defendants present as follows:
Parties have settled, State Farm to issue a settlement check of $275,000.00 to the Plaintiff in exchanged for a full dismissal with prejudice as to all Defendants, within 30 days.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Matter is placed on CRC-225 Dismissal Calendar in Dept. 212 for Nov. 21, 2006 at 10:00 A.M.
